title: PvP by Z0L08
description: This modpack is great for pvp adding some visuals and performance upgrades.
body:
This modpack is great for pvp. It adds some visuals like armor slots near the hotbar and some others. This modpack also adds simple voice chat, a popular voice chat mod to talk to friends and meet others in-game.

Enjoy the advantages of mods for your pvp adventure!!!
